LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AUSTIN SUI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (DEMURRER 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION CONVERSION SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF CONTRACT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. ALLEGATIONS OF ALTER EGO NOT SUFFICIENTLY SPECIFIC. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. SAME GROUND AS 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. ALLEGATIONS OF REPRESENTATIONS INSUFFICIENT. ALSO ALTER EGO ALLEGATIONS INSUFFICIENT. CLAIMS NOT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. MORE FACTS RE JOINT VENTURE MUST BE ALLEGED. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNJUST ENRICHMENT SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE. NOT UNJUST ENRICHMENT. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTERFERENCE WITH CONTRACT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. NOT ADEQUATELY ALLEGED. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION DECLARATORY RELIEF SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE. NO BASIS FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONSTRUCTIVE TRUST OVERRULED. ALLEGATIONS OF LOAN SUFFICIENT. MOTION TO STRIKE MOOT OFF CALENDAR) WITH THE EXCEPTION THAT THE 1ST, 6TH, AND 9TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE ALL SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. 20 DAYS TO AMEND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/AJR/CW(EX)) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT AUSTIN SUI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
APPEAR: Jeffrey L. Sikkema, Esq. 714/424-5555 for pltfs & opposing parties; David Sasseen, Esq. 408/569-1060 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (DEMURRER 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION CONVERSION SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF CONTRACT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. ALLEGATIONS OF ALTER EGO NOT SUFFICIENTLY SPECIFIC. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. SAME GROUND AS 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. ALLEGATIONS OF REPRESENTATIONS INSUFFICIENT. ALSO ALTER EGO ALLEGATIONS INSUFFICIENT. CLAIMS NOT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. MORE FACTS RE JOINT VENTURE MUST BE ALLEGED. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNJUST ENRICHMENT SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE. NOT UNJUST ENRICHMENT. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTERFERENCE WITH CONTRACT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. NOT ADEQUATELY ALLEGED. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION DECLARATORY RELIEF SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE. NO BASIS FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONSTRUCTIVE TRUST OVERRULED. ALLEGATIONS OF LOAN SUFFICIENT. MOTION TO STRIKE MOOT OFF CALENDAR) with the exception that the 1st, 6th, and 9th causes of action are all sustained with leave to amend. 20 days to amend. Order signed in open court. (302/AJR/CW(EX)) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
